settings.title: Settings
settings.api_key_hint: Required for AI recipe import (photo & URL)

create.title: Create Recipe
create.manual_desc: Create a recipe step by step
create.photos_desc: Take or upload photos, AI extracts the recipe
create.url_desc: Paste a recipe URL, AI extracts the recipe
create.import_desc: Import a recipe folder hosted on Drive, GitHub, Box, etc.

export.done_body: Folder "{{folder}}" written ({{count}} media file(s)). Save it to Drive, GitHub or anywhere else.

import.title: Import from URL
import.description: Paste a direct URL to a kitchen48-recipe.yaml file. Media files referenced with relative paths will be fetched from the same folder; absolute URLs are fetched as-is.
import.url_hint: For Google Drive, use a per-file direct-download URL (https://drive.google.com/uc?id=…) or host the folder somewhere that serves files at relative paths (GitHub raw, Dropbox, Box, S3).
import.invalid_url_body: Please paste the URL of the kitchen48-recipe.yaml file.
